theme: hearing the shape of pans, then predicting a baking sheet
title: Hearing the Shape of Pans
strategies: blind constant guess: hard-coded area-scaling coefficient, no data fit, no perimeter term (trivial)
single-term least squares: fit one effective (area * lam) coefficient pooling all training pans, ignore the boundary entirely (greedy trap)
log-log single power law N ~ c*lam^p fit across all shapes (also lands in the greedy trap)

regime-sequenced decomposition: recover the area coefficient from the high-lam rows where it alone dominates, then recover the perimeter and constant coefficients from the residual on the low-lam rows, and compose the two-term Weyl-style law (strong)
